top_stories.title: LoRA in LoRA: Towards Parameter-Efficient Architecture Expansion for Continual Visual Instruction Tuning
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2508.06202v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Continual Visual Instruction Tuning (CVIT) enables Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to incrementally learn new tasks over time. However, this process is challenged by catastrophic forgetting, where performance on previously learned tasks deteriorates as the model adapts to new ones.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

top_stories.title: Google busts the myth that AI search needs its own SEO playbook
top_stories.summary: Google says the SEO industry's favorite new buzzwords, "generative engine optimization" and "answer engine optimization," are just regular SEO by another name. In new documentation, the company dismantles common tactics like LLMS.txt files and content chunking, making it clear that AI search runs on the same ranking systems as traditional search. T
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
top_stories.primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

top_stories.title: Further Notes on Our Recent Research on AI Delegation and Long-Horizon Reliability
top_stories.summary: Our recent paper, “LLMs Corrupt Your Documents When You Delegate”, has generated discussion about the reliability of AI systems in delegated workflows. top_stories.technical_takeaway: Signals incremental evolution rather than a paradigm shift in current AI systems.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Foundation for future optimization rather than immediate disruption.

top_stories.title: ChatGPT now wants access to your bank account so it can tell you to stop ordering takeout
top_stories.summary: OpenAI is turning ChatGPT into a personal financial assistant. Pro users in the US can now connect their bank accounts through Plaid to get personalized analysis based on real transaction data. top_stories.title: Greg Brockman Officially Takes Control of OpenAI’s Products in Latest Shake-Up
top_stories.summary: OpenAI is once again reorganizing its executive ranks as part of its effort to unify ChatGPT and Codex into one core product experience.
